Container.Name: unifi-os-server
Container.Overview:
The UniFi OS Server is the new standard for self-hosting UniFi, replacing the legacy UniFi Network Server. While the Network Server provided basic hosting functionality, it lacked support for key UniFi OS features like Organizations, IdP Integration, or Site Magic SD-WAN. With a fully unified operating system, UniFi OS Server now delivers the same management experience as UniFi-native–including CloudKeys, Cloud Gateways, and Official UniFi Hosting–and is fully compatible with Site Manager for centralized, multi-site control.
https://help.ui.com/hc/en-us/articles/34210126298775-Self-Hosting-UniFi
!Frequently Asked Questions! What is the difference between images? The uosserver image is provided by UniFi, extracted from the installation binary. The unifi-os-server image provides better compatibility for Docker and Kubernetes with directory fixes and configuration through environment variables.
Why does the container need privileged access? The underlying structure of UniFi OS Server runs every component as systemd services which requires access to the host cgroup.
Additional Requirements: KEEP Docker NAME of unifi-os-server Set the inform address: set-inform http://$UOS_SYSTEM_IP:8080/inform
If having isseus Enable Privileged... https://github.com/lemker/unifi-os-server/issues/59#issuecomment-4087959272
extra parm --cgroupns host --cap-add NET_RAW --cap-add NET_ADMIN --tmpfs /run:exec --tmpfs /run/lock --tmpfs /tmp:exec --tmpfs /var/lib/journal --tmpfs /var/opt/unifi/tmp:size=64m -v /sys/fs/cgroup:/sys/fs/cgroup:rw --name unifi-os-server --hostname unifi --restart unless-stopped
Container.Category: HomeAutomation: Other: Network:Web Network:DNS Network:Proxy Network:Management Network:VPN Network:Privacy Network:Other
Container.ExtraParams: --cgroupns host --cap-add NET_RAW --cap-add NET_ADMIN --tmpfs /run:exec --tmpfs /run/lock --tmpfs /tmp:exec --tmpfs /var/lib/journal --tmpfs /var/opt/unifi/tmp:size=64m -v /sys/fs/cgroup:/sys/fs/cgroup:rw --name unifi-os-server --hostname unifi --restart unless-stopped
Container.Requires:
KEEP Docker NAME of unifi-os-server Set the inform address: set-inform http://$UOS_SYSTEM_IP:8080/inform
If having isseus Enable Privileged... https://github.com/lemker/unifi-os-server/issues/59#issuecomment-4087959272
extra parm --cgroupns host --cap-add NET_RAW --cap-add NET_ADMIN --tmpfs /run:exec --tmpfs /run/lock --tmpfs /tmp:exec --tmpfs /var/lib/journal --tmpfs /var/opt/unifi/tmp:size=64m -v /sys/fs/cgroup:/sys/fs/cgroup:rw --name unifi-os-server --hostname unifi --restart unless-stopped

Config.Name: TCPDokerNatPort443
Config.Description: [update webui in template 11443] Ingress Used for UniFi OS Server GUI/API Docker nat webui port 11443 maped to contaner port 443

Config.Name: TCPDokerNatP5005
Config.Description: Ingress Used for RTP (Real-time Transport Protocol) control protocol

Config.Name: TCPDokerNatP9543
Config.Description: Ingress Used for UniFi Identity Hub

Config.Name: TCPDokerNatP6789
Config.Description: Ingress Used for UniFi mobile speed test

Config.Name: TCPDokerNatP8080
Config.Description: Ingress Used for Device and application communication

Config.Name: TCPDokerNatP8443
Config.Description: Ingress Used for UniFi Network Application GUI/API

Config.Name: TCPDokerNatP8444
Config.Description: Ingress Used for Secure Portal for Hotspot

Config.Name: UDPDokerNatP3478
Config.Description: Both(bidrectional) used for STUN for device adoption and communication (also required for Remote Management)

Config.Name: UDPDokerNatP5514
Config.Description: Ingress USed for Remote syslog capture

Config.Name: UDPDokerNatP10003
Config.Description: Ingress Used for Device discovery during adoption

Config.Name: TCPDokerNatP11084
Config.Description: Ingress Used for UniFi Site Supervisor

Config.Name: TCPDokerNatP8880
Config.Description: Ingress Used for Hotspot portal redirection (HTTP)

Config.Name: TCPDokerNatP8881
Config.Description: Ingress Used for Hotspot portal redirection (HTTP)

Config.Name: TCPDokerNatP8882
Config.Description: Ingress Used for Hotspot portal redirection (HTTP)

Config.Name: UOS_SYSTEM_IP
Config.Description: Hostname or IP for UniFi OS Server unifi.example.com
